patch:
--- a/shift_register_16bit.v
+++ b/shift_register_16bit.v
@@ -16,8 +16,8 @@ module datapath (
   shift_register_16bit sreg (
     .clk(clk),
     .reset(rst),
-    .parallel_in(input_bus)
+    .parallel_in(input_bus),
+    .parallel_out(output_bus)
   );
-  assign output_bus = 16'b0;
 endmodule
